THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PIERRE, CECIL ALLEN, DEBORAH THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 106 SIXTH ST, #606, S.F., STAYED UNTIL FEB-03-1998, LEASE FORFEITED, 5PM.NO FURTHER STAYS. IF DEFTS FAIL TO VACATE, DEFTS TO PAY $1,755- BACK RENT PLUS DAMAGES OF $19.29 PER DAY FROM 12/31/ 97 THRU 2/3/98 PLUS $165- COSTS (TOTAL $2,595.05). MUTUAL WAIVER OF ALL CLAIMS INCL 1542CC.PERSONAL PROP LEFT DEEMED ABANDONED.NO ONE ELSE HAS RIGHT TO POSSESSION.
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PATEL, N. R. AS TO DEFENDANT PIERRE, CECIL ALLEN, DEBORAH DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED
